---
title: "Column Screen Mapping Test"
papersize: us-letter
format:
  typst:
    keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        # column-screen* classes should map to wideblock with appropriate sides
        - ['#wideblock\(side: "both"\)']
        - []
      noErrors: default
---

## Column Screen (Maps to Full Page)

::: {.column-screen}
CONTENT-SCREEN: This HTML-style screen width maps to full page width in Typst.
:::

## Column Screen Inset

::: {.column-screen-inset}
CONTENT-SCREEN-INSET: This also maps to full page width in Typst.
:::
